title: Object Area Size (0x4C)
description: Object Area Size triplet layout. Length and TID are not mapped here; payload starts at offset 2.

elements.name: SizeType
elements.description: Specifies the actual object area size to be used.

elements.name: XoaSize
elements.description: Object area extent for the X axis (unsigned binary, 3 bytes, big-endian).

elements.name: YoaSize
elements.description: Object area extent for the Y axis (unsigned binary, 3 bytes, big-endian).

notes: TID for this triplet is X'4C'. Length field (offset 0) and TID (offset 1) are intentionally not mapped per instructions.
